title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE INAWAYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL芒聙聰 SIBULAN, MUNICIPALITY OF STA. CRUZ, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL SUR FROM THE INAWAYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS SIBULAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 5351; 106 OG No. 11, 1397 (March 15, 2010)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9895, December 31, 2009 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE INAWAYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL芒聙聰 SIBULAN, MUNICIPALITY OF STA. CRUZ, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL SUR FROM THE INAWAYAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS SIBULAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

芒聙聰 The Pines City National High School芒聙聰 The Inawayan National High School芒聙聰 Sibulan Annex in Barangayu Sibulan, Municipality of Sta. Cruz, province of Davao del Sur is hereby separated from the Inawayan National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Sbulan National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聰 All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Inawayan National High School芒聙聰 Sibulan Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Sibulan National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Sibulan National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the Inawayan National High School芒聙聰 Sibulan Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for tyhe continued oiperation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation

芒聙聰 The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity

芒聙聰 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) PROSPERO C. NOGRALES

(Sgd.) JUAN PONCE ENRILE

Speaker of the House of Representatives

President of Senate

(Sgd.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

(Sgd.) EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary General House of Representatives

Secretary of Senate

Approved: December 31, 2009

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL - ARROYO

President of the Philippines
